title: Sour Gooey Algerian Roasted Pepper Stir-fry
description: This light Algerian dish features sour roasted peppers in a sauce made from lemon juice and sugar-free yogurt, served as a savory snack or side dish.
instructions: Wash the bell peppers and remove their stems.
Cut a shallow cross shape in each pepper with kitchen shears for easier roasting.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, cut-side up. Season with salt and pepper.
Roast peppers until soft and slightly charred, about 20-25 minutes. Rotate peppers occasionally for even cooking.
Let them cool enough to handle before piercing them all over with a fork. Squeeze lemon juice evenly into the roasted peppers.
Mix sugar-free yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Gently stir-in the mixture through the cooled peppers until they are coated well.
Serve immediately as a snack or side dish.
